item.title: How I Found Myself doing Data science in marketing
item.description: Since February 26 i am working at Seedstars Ivory Coast in a venture named Bora digital who works mostly in marketing and digital marketing. From a first background of agronomy (my Bsc) to bioinformatics (my master), at each step i have faced surprises, questions and oppositions from peoples around me. How do you did it? Why are you know working in marketings ? Why are you not as your peers working in farms or at least pursuing bioinformatics studies?

item.title: How to follow and engage with the R community
bioSyntax
item.description: The purpose of bioSyntax is to bring you closer to your data, giving you an intuitive & empathetic understanding of biology. bioSyntax integrate seamlessly with vim (Linux / Mac / Win), sublime (Linux / Mac / Win), gedit (Linux / Win), & less (Linux / Mac). After installing bioSyntax files will automatically detected by file-extension. The projects was developed during hackseq 2017 and won the hackathlon. I’m really proud to be a part of the bioSyntax team and of this project.

+++ title = ‘2019 05 27 Building My First R Package’ date = 2019-05-27T09:46:23Z draft = true meta_img = “/images/image.jpg” tags = [“tags”] description = “Desc” hacker_news_id = “” lobsters_id = “” +++ The begining In the beginning I read a post from David Robinson advising aspiring Data scientist to start a blog and to create a package starting by data package that can be useful. So I decided to follow his advice and tried to find a good purpose for my package first.

item.title: About
item.description: From my studies i’m a crop protection engineer. I have done my master thesis in the field of bioinformatics at the Institute of Ecology and Evolution of University of Bern under the supervision of Dominique Koua and Lucia Kuhn-Nentwig. My master thesis was about “Prediction, functionnal annotation and classification of toxins-like peptides: case of the venom gland of Macroctenus kingsleyi”. I am looking for opportunities to do my PhD in bioinformtics or Genomics data science, so any proposition will be really helpful for me.

item.title: Home
item.description: I did not learned all i know by myself. R is above all else a fantastic community and i have learned from many kind peoples. I strongly recommend you to check blog of Yihui Xie, David Robinson, Julia Silge, Maelle Salmon, R Studio Blog, R Weekly, R bloggers and Simply Statistics. You will learn a lot from theses blogs. For more about who to follow and how to get involved in R community check my post on this subject here.
